task_description: Issue #17: TDD Pipeline Testing, Refinement and Deployment Preparation. Expand test coverage (end-to-end flow, error paths, snapshot tests), implement multi-environment support via CDK context, add CDK Pipeline construct skeleton, and update ARCHITECTURE.md.

verification.summary: All 72 tests pass (19 new tests added). CDK synth succeeds. Tests exercise new code paths: EndToEndFlowTest verifies state machine chain traversal by parsing DefinitionString JSON; SnapshotTest guards resource counts; MultiEnvironmentTest verifies environment context reading and tag application; PipelineConstructTest verifies PipelineStack synthesis.
